title: cedrus atlantica f. fastigiata
intro: Cedrus atlantica f. fastigiata, also known as the Atlas Cedar, is a conical evergreen tree that belongs to the Pinaceae family and is native to the Atlas Mountains in Morocco. This tree has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cedrus atlantica f. fastigiata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the wood and essential oil of the Atlas Cedar are used in aromatherapy, and the leaves are made into a tea that can be used to treat respiratory issues and coughs.
